LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS K & L GATES LLP, PETER KALIS AND EDWARD SANGSTER'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDING PENDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THIS ACTION IS STAYED AS TO THE MOVING DEFENDANTS PENDING DETERMINATION OF THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRTION AND, IF THAT MOTION IS GRANTED, PENDING COMPLETION OF THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS LEHMAN BROTHERS REAL ESTATE ASSOCIATES III, L.P., LEHMAN BROTHERS PRIVATE EQUITY ADVISORS LLC, REAL ESTATE PRIVATE EQUITY INC. AND ALVAREZ & MARSAL NORTH AMERICA, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 8 BECAUSE TAKING THE ALLEGATIONS AS TRUE PLAINTIFF HAS ADEQUATELY PLEADED THE NECESSARY ELEMENTS AND IT IS NOT APPARENT FROM THE ALLEGATIONS THAT ALVAREZ IS NECESSARILY IMMUNE. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 7 BECAUSE EVEN ASSUMING PERMISSION TO ADD CLAIMS THERE IS NO DEFAMATORY PUBLICATION AND PLAINTIFF CANNOT PLEAD THAT DEFENDANT'S OWED HIM A DUTY IN NEGLIGENCE AND CERTAINLY IS NOT ONE IN WHICH PLAINTIFF'S EMOTIONAL CONDITION ARE AN OBJECT. MR. COX TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ROD PARKER, TEL. NO. (925) 254-8011, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. CHRISTOPHER J. COX OF THE WEILL GOTSHAL & MANGES LLP, TEL. NO. (650) 802-3029 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS LEHMAN BROTHERS REAL ESTATE ASSOCIATES III, L.P., LEHMAN BROTHERS PRIVATE EQUITY ADVISORS LLC, REAL ESTATE PRIVATE EQUITY INC. AND ALVAREZ & MARSAL NORTH AMERICA, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 8 BECAUSE TAKING THE ALLEGATIONS AS TRUE PLAINTIFF HAS ADEQUATELY PLEADED THE NECESSARY ELEMENTS AND IT IS NOT APPARENT FROM THE ALLEGATIONS THAT ALVAREZ IS NECESSARILY IMMUNE. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 7 BECAUSE EVEN ASSUMING PERMISSION TO ADD CLAIMS THERE IS NO DEFAMATORY PUBLICATION AND PLAINTIFF CANNOT PLEAD THAT DEFENDANT'S OWED HIM A DUTY IN NEGLIGENCE AND CERTAINLY IS NOT ONE IN WHICH PLAINTIFF'S EMOTIONAL CONDITION ARE AN OBJECT. MR. COX TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
